text: As artificial intelligence becomes more common in our daily lives, questions about ethics are increasingly important. One major concern is bias in AI systems. If the data used to train AI contains unfair patterns, the AI can make discriminatory decisions. This affects fairness, especially in areas like hiring or loan applications. Another key issue is privacy. AI often collects large amounts of personal information, raising concerns about how this data is used and protected. To address these problems, transparency is essential. Users should understand how AI makes decisions. Finally, we need responsible AI development, where creators consider the ethical impact of their technology from the very beginning. This helps build trust and ensure AI benefits everyone.
